indications.text:
PRESTALIA contains perindopril arginine, an angiotensin converting enzyme inhibitor, and amlodipine, a
dihydropyridine calcium channel blocker, and is indicated for the treatment of hypertension, to lower blood pressure.
PRESTALIA may be used in patients whose blood pressure is not adequately contro...
